meaning: n.翅,翅膀,翼,飞翔,机翼,派别vt.装以翼,飞过,使飞,空运,增加...速度vi.飞,飞行
examples: He is on the right wing of the party.
It's as if someone was trying to parody right-wing narratives of government bureaucracy and incompetence.
Dah Wing Wah is the place to go for the village cuisine of the northern New Territories.
